_comment: Builder Loops verification manifest. install = npm install only (no browser-binary download, which restricted sandboxes block). acceptance = build suite + deterministic validation of the committed real execution evidence (a genuine WebM exported by the running app via MediaRecorder), so the sandbox proves the behavioral path produced real output, not just that the code compiles. See evidence/README.md. The full Playwright e2e (npm run test:e2e) regenerates that evidence in capable environments.
acceptance: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run preview-build && npm run verify:evidence
